channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: European Leaders Mark Fourth Anniversary of Ukraine War as Prospects for Peace Remain Distant
item.description: On the fourth anniversary of Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, European leaders gathered in Kyiv in a show of solidarity with President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and the Ukrainian people. The ceremony in Maidan...

item.title: David Lammy Admits Court Backlog May Persist Despite Planned Justice Reforms
item.description: In this episode of Newscast, Adam Fleming and Chris Mason interview Deputy Prime Minister David Lammy about the government’s proposed justice reforms and the ongoing challenges facing the UK court sys...

item.title: Ukrainian Former Wall Street Professional Returns Home as Combat Medic Amid Russia-Ukraine War
item.description: Viktoriia Honcharuk, a Ukrainian national, gave up a promising career on Wall Street to serve as a combat medic in her home country after Russia launched its full-scale invasion in February 2022. Desp...

item.title: Plaid Cymru leader outlines plans for national commission on Welsh independence
item.description: Rhun ap Iorwerth, leader of Plaid Cymru, has pledged that a future Welsh government under his leadership will establish a national commission to explore Wales' constitutional future, including the pos...

item.title: Parliamentary Debate on Prince Andrew Signals Changing Attitudes Toward Royal Accountability
item.description: Members of the UK Parliament have openly criticised Prince Andrew during a formal debate, marking a notable departure from longstanding conventions that traditionally shield the Royal Family from dire...

item.title: Cruz Beckham's Debut Performance Shows Promise in Psych-Pop Despite Musical Inconsistencies
item.description: Cruz Beckham, the youngest son of David and Victoria Beckham, took the stage in Cardiff with a mixed but intriguing performance. Despite his celebrity background, Beckham shows genuine enthusiasm and ...

item.title: Harry Brook leads England to T20 World Cup semi-final with century in Pallekele
item.description: Harry Brook delivered a standout performance for the England men's cricket team in Pallekele, scoring a brilliant 100 off 51 balls in a T20 international against Pakistan. Coming after a challenging w...

item.title: Democratic Leaders' Role in Blocking War Powers Resolution on Trump’s Iran War Plans

item.title: The Fashion Highlights from the Brit Awards 2026 Red Carpet
item.description: At the 2026 Brit Awards in Manchester, the red carpet showcased a stunning variety of fashion choices from music's biggest stars. Lola Young embraced a grunge aesthetic with a sculpted corset top pair...

item.title: Universities Face Backlash Over Faculty Connections to Epstein
item.description: The release of new Department of Justice (DOJ) documents detailing Jeffrey Epstein’s extensive connections within academia has caused a stir across U.S. universities. Emails spanning years show that E...

item.title: West Bromwich Albion Sack Head Coach Eric Ramsay After Nine Winless Games Amid Relegation Battle
item.description: West Bromwich Albion have parted ways with head coach Eric Ramsay after a brief and unsuccessful tenure of just nine games. The 34-year-old Ramsay, who previously worked as a coach at Manchester Unite...

item.title: Police End Searches at Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor's Former Royal Lodge as Parliament Supports Release of Trade Envoy Appointment Files
item.description: Thames Valley Police have completed their searches at Royal Lodge in Windsor Great Park, Berkshire, the former residence of Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, following his arrest last Thursday at Sandringha...

item.title: South Africans return home after being misled into fighting in Ukraine
item.description: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa has expressed gratitude to Russian President Vladimir Putin for assisting in the return of 17 South Africans who were allegedly misled into joining the Russia-U...

item.title: Newcastle confident ahead of Champions League last-16 draw after strong European run
item.description: Newcastle United have sent a clear message of confidence to potential Champions League opponents after securing their place in the last 16 with a 3-2 win over Qarabag, completing a dominant 9-3 aggreg...

item.title: UK Government Reopens Revised Sustainable Farming Incentive with Funding Caps and Reforms
item.description: The UK government has announced the relaunch of its flagship environmental payment programme for farmers, the Sustainable Farming Incentive (SFI), after its abrupt closure in March 2025 caused widespr...

item.title: Upcoming Webinar Critiques Canada's Small Modular Reactor Initiatives and Spending

item.title: Polanski and Farage: Surprising Parallels Despite Political Differences

item.title: Trump Faces Limited Options as Pressure on Iran Fails
item.description: The United States, under President Donald Trump, has amassed significant military forces near Iran in an effort to compel the Iranian government to negotiate on terms favorable to Washington. Despite ...
